parents.subject: LU-14954 socklnd: fix link state detection

commit.subject: LU-14920 llite: Remove flag but leave PDIO enabled
commit.message:
LU-14920 llite: Remove flag but leave PDIO enabled

Let's try not setting the flag but leaving it enabled -
other testing indicates the actual dio code isn't getting
called so I think the only change is the flag.

Test-parameters: trivial

Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Iad05b6a722694a16679358ac17a1de8252181da7
